title: Adrenalinn
description: A tiny mod that adds simple adrenaline rush system to Minecraft.
body:
### ADRENALINN ### 

This mod introduces a streamlined yet impactful, realistic mechanic to Minecraft.

The Adrenaline effect is triggered upon taking damage from mobs, projectiles, or fire. It also activates from significant damage (4+ health points) inflicted by other players. A five-minute cooldown follows each activation.

During this adrenaline rush, you gain increased movement speed, faster mining speed, and a temporary damage resistance.
